name: Prince of Wales Cake
recipeInstructions:
---------------------------------WHITE PART---------------------------------
1 cup Flour
1/2 cup Cornstarch
1/2 cup Butter, softened
1 cup Granulated sugar
1/2 cup Milk
2 teaspoons Baking powder
3 Egg whites (stiffly beaten)
DARK CAKE: Cream butter; then add sugar, beating well. Add egg yolks singly, with a spoonful of the flour at a time. Beat well and stir in raisins. Slowly pour in molasses and milk, adding a small amount of the flour. Mix in remaining flour, spices, and baking soda. Pour into prepared straight-sided pan and bake at 350°F for about 1 hour.
WHITE CAKE: Sift together flour and cornstarch. Rub in butter. Blend in sugar. Whisk together milk and baking powder. Fold in egg whites. Pour into prepared pan. Bake at 350°F for about 1 hour. While no instructions were provided, a caramel or almond icing are suggested for this cake.
